---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for feynman
labels: feature
---

## Use Case

Describe the situation where you need this feature. What are you trying to do,
and what makes the current behavior insufficient?

## Proposed Behavior

What should feynman do differently? Be specific about inputs, outputs, and
any new commands or options.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why do you prefer the proposed behavior?

## Would You Contribute the PR?

- [ ] Yes, I would open a PR for this
- [ ] No, but I can test it
- [ ] No

---

Before filing: check [`.planning/ROADMAP.md`](../../.planning/ROADMAP.md) to
see if this is already planned for a future milestone.
